steps.name: Expand priceAlerts schema with new columns
steps.description: Add storeId (nullable UUID FK to stores), targetDiscountPercent (decimal, nullable), notifyEmail (boolean, default true), and notifySlackWebhook (text, nullable) columns to the priceAlerts table. Make the existing targetPrice column nullable to support discount-only alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: priceAlerts table has a nullable `storeId` column with a foreign key reference to `stores.id`
priceAlerts table has a nullable `targetDiscountPercent` decimal(5,2) column
priceAlerts table has a `notifyEmail` boolean column defaulting to true
priceAlerts table has a nullable `notifySlackWebhook` text column
The existing `targetPrice` column is now nullable (to allow discount-only alerts)
All existing columns (id, userId, gameId, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt) are preserved unchanged

steps.name: Add Zod validation schemas for alert payloads
steps.description: Add createAlertSchema and updateAlertSchema Zod schemas in the validation module. The create schema requires gameId and at least one of targetPrice or targetDiscountPercent. The update schema makes all fields optional.
acceptanceCriteria: `createAlertSchema` enforces that at least one of `targetPrice` or `targetDiscountPercent` is provided via a Zod refinement
`updateAlertSchema` is exported and makes all fields optional (partial of create schema without gameId)
Existing validation schemas are not modified

steps.name: Create encryption utility for Slack webhook
steps.description: Create a new encryption module that provides encrypt and decrypt functions using AES-256-GCM with the ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable. This is used to store notifySlackWebhook encrypted at rest.
acceptanceCriteria: `encrypt(plaintext: string): string` function is exported and returns a colon-separated string of iv:authTag:ciphertext (all hex-encoded)
`decrypt(encrypted: string): string` function is exported and reverses the encryption
Both functions use AES-256-GCM with a 32-byte key derived from the `ENCRYPTION_KEY` env var
The module throws a clear error if `ENCRYPTION_KEY` is not set when encrypt/decrypt is called

steps.name: Add ENCRYPTION_KEY to .env.example
steps.description: Add an ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable entry to .env.example under a new 'Encryption' section so developers know to configure it.
acceptanceCriteria: `.env.example` contains an `ENCRYPTION_KEY` entry with a placeholder value and a descriptive comment
